mapper.select: SELECT menu_id, menu_name, price, category, image_url, description, is_available, sold_out_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM menus ORDER BY menu_id DESC
SELECT menu_id, menu_name, price, category, image_url, description, is_available, sold_out_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM menus WHERE menu_id = #{menuId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menus ( menu_name, price, category, image_url, description, is_available, sold_out_reason ) VALUES ( #{menuName}, #{price}, #{category}, #{imageUrl}, #{description}, #{isAvailable}, #{soldOutReason} )
